perception_artifact.layout_description: White slide with pale blueprint-style line art in the corners, a Jefferson College of Population Health logo at top left, and a small instruction line near the top. A large centered “Apply.” headline dominates the slide, with contact details below, an application URL section near the lower middle, and a blue footer bar along the bottom.
